name: Spinach and Grapefruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 cups loosely packed fresh spinach, (approx. 1/2 lb.)
1 sectioned Texas Ruby Red grapefruit, (reserve remaining)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach and tear it into salad-sized pieces.
2. Add the grapefruit sections and juice to the spinach.
3. Toss well.
4. Serve as is, or add a small amount of low-calorie French dressing.
5. The slight tartness of fresh spinach makes the grapefruit taste sweeter.
Note: (45 calories per serving) 1 serving = 1/2 Fruit exchange 1 Vegetable exchange
